use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers or user menus
Showing user avatars in comment sections or social feeds
Representing users or entities in lists and cards
Providing fallback initials when user images fail to load
Displaying team member or contact avatars in address books
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based avatar component with support for images and fallback initials. Built on Radix primitives for accessibility, this atomic component provides a rounded container for displaying user profile pictures with graceful degradation to initials when images fail to load. Used in navigation, user menus, comments, and any interface requiring user or entity representation.
